{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260318164006B55226F7F4DCAA173240\"}"},"total":4825},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7036744893959996192","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"9分。对得起这个评分的小说，有些小瑕疵，但是总体挺不错的。有主线剧情，主角性格不圣母也不阴暗，不是三观跟着五官跑，全员智商基本在线。问题的话就是有些小啰嗦，跳几章基本就能完美解决了，不影响阅读。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1638369847,"group_id":"6820321646092487688","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"欢迎有理有据的讨论，抬杠骂到底","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3dH50nIbeYwUbnwU39kgpOJJmjxBXBzr8OJhgfFwd1e","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c5afe472333e46e88b7385ae1283865a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776357609\u0026x-signature=v%2FQHjiLwUUaGKGNsCPN9f80%2FATE%3D","user_id":"1380615581340124","user_name":"*开朗的评论家*"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1380615581340124","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1646580179,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6820321646092487688","book_info":{"abstract":"都市平凡小子，被拜金女友劈腿之后，意外获得修仙大佬传承，从此呼风唤雨，成为都市神仙。国医名手，是我徒弟，江湖老大，是我小弟，顶级大佬，是我属下……左手翻云，财源滚滚，右手覆雨，装逼打脸。人生就是这么快意，酣畅淋漓！事了拂衣去，深藏功与名，从此人间只有我的传说。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/e3d1f020c3a800df78bf034ed473e187","author":"流连往返","autho
